# Weekly Investment Recommendations
**Week 25, 2026** (2026-06-15 – 2026-06-19)

> Strategy: Swedish small/midcap stocks · 13,000 SEK bankroll · 1–2% risk per trade · Manual execution

> **Regenerated 2026-06-19** (original report date 2026-06-18)

## Portfolio Overview

| | |
|---|---|
| Bankroll (strategy) | **13,000 SEK** |
| Portfolio value (cash + positions) | **12,055 SEK** |
| Cash | 5,176 SEK (40% of bankroll) |
| Invested | 6,879 SEK (53% of bankroll) |
| Drawdown from peak | 7.3% |
| Risk mode | **CAUTION — half size (drawdown 5–10%)** |

## Portfolio Risk Summary

| | |
|---|---|
| Portfolio heat | **2.8%** of capital at open risk (limit: 8.0%) |
| Cash available | 5,176 SEK (40% of capital) |
| Sector exposure | Healthcare 31%, Utilities 26% |

| Total positions | 5 |
